TooltipTypes.Tip: Map (M)
Inventory (I)
Quest Log (L)
Social (O)
Options (ESC)
Join Dungeon Blitz as a Premium Member
Begin a message in your chat box below that will go just to this teammate
Make this teammate the party leader
Teleport to this member of the party
Kick this teammate from the party
Invite this person to your party
Look at the gear this person is wearing
Travel back out of this mission back to the door you entered
Stand back up with this much health
Paladins can take a blow, heal friends, and smash whole groups of badguys at once.
Mages can hit hard from anywhere and do well at dealing with groups.
Rogues hit hard, move fast, and confound badguys with misdirection and entanglement.
Invite this player to be your friend.
Invite a player to be your friend.
Accept no more messages from a player.
Your current health
Your current rage. You need rage to use your powers
When this bar is full, you level up
Gold you have
Current Chat Channel
Speak to players nearby
Speak to teammates in your party
Speak to the players in your guild
Chat Options
Chat shortcut: Hit [Enter] to begin Hit [Enter] to send
REACT$You must first unlock more character slots in the in-game store.
